ogTitle: Blair Athol vs Blakeview: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Blair Athol and Blakeview.
heading: Blair Athol vs Blakeview — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Blair Athol, South Australia and Blakeview, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Blair Athol has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Blakeview (40/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Blair Athol or Blakeview safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Blair Athol has a flood risk score of 49/100, while Blakeview scores 22/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Blair Athol scores 16/100 for bushfire risk. Blakeview scores 57/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Blair Athol or Blakeview?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Blair Athol has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.43% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
